description: Influenza due to unidentified influenza virus with other respiratory manifestations.
Acute nasopharyngitis [common cold]. Symptoms: runny nose, sneezing, sore throat.
Pneumonia, unspecified organism. Inflammation of one or both lungs with fluid.
COVID-19, virus identified. Respiratory syndrome caused by SARS-CoV-2.
Essential (primary) hypertension. High blood pressure without identifiable cause.
Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications. Blood sugar regulation issues.
Migraine, unspecified, not intractable, without status migrainosus. Severe headache.
Low back pain. Pain in the lumbar region of the spine.
Atopic dermatitis, unspecified. Itchy, inflamed skin (eczema).
Gastro-esophageal reflux disease without esophagitis. Heartburn or acid reflux.
